MOT & Garage Management Software for Birmingham Garages

Increase your garage revenue by 40% with automated MOT reminders, DVSA integration, and smart advisory tracking. Trusted by garages across Birmingham and the West Midlands.

Customer Retention Rate

Purpose-Built for Birmingham Garages

📊

Automated MOT Reminders

SMS and email reminders at 30, 14, and 7 days before expiry—automatically increasing your bookings.

🔍

DVSA Data Integration

Direct access to MOT history, mileage trends, and hidden advisories for every vehicle.

💼

Customer CRM Built-In

Manage all customer data, vehicles, and service history in one dashboard. No separate tool needed.

💰

Smart Advisory Quotes

Generate professional quotes instantly from MOT advisories. Perfect for converting leads to jobs.

📈

Analytics & Reporting

Track revenue, conversion rates, customer lifetime value, and ROI in real-time.

🛡️

UK Compliance Built-In

GDPR compliant, secure UK data centers, and audit-ready for vehicle data handling.

Success Stories from Birmingham Garages

"Setup was incredibly easy. Within a week we saw a massive improvement in customer retention and bookings."

Started with 50 vehicles

£2,800/month revenue increase

"Best investment we've made. The automated reminders save us 10 hours a week and capture work we'd miss."

Started with 120 vehicles

+£3,500/month revenue increase

"The CRM features alone are worth it. We know exactly which customers are due and follow up consistently."

Started with 80 vehicles

£2,200/month revenue increase

How It Works (Setup in 10 Minutes)

1

Connect Your Data

Link your existing customer list and vehicle data. We handle the DVSA integration automatically.

2

Set Reminders

Choose when to send reminders (30, 14, 7 days before expiry). Customize messages with your branding.

3

Watch Revenue Grow

Our system automatically sends reminders, tracks conversions, and shows you what's working.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No setup fees. No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime. 14-day free trial included.

Starter

Perfect for sole traders

£9 per month
  • 1 user account
  • Up to 200 vehicles
  • Basic job management
  • Email support
Start Free Trial

Professional

Best for growing garages

£29 per month
  • Up to 5 users
  • Up to 500 vehicles
  • Full CRM & job management
  • Automation & reports
  • Priority support
Start Free Trial

Business

For established garages

£49 per month
  • Unlimited users
  • Unlimited vehicles
  • API access
  • Multi-location support
  • Dedicated account manager
Start Free Trial
